title: erucastrum littoreum subsp. littoreum
intro: Erucastrum littoreum subsp. littoreum, also known as sea rocket, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and reduce oxidative stress in the body. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, including vitamin C, vitamin E, and potassium, offering various health benefits such as improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Erucastrum littoreum subsp. littoreum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or supplements, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural health solutions.
